args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2018 Prius Two is an absolute gem. Over 50 MPG, only 71,000 miles, and Toyota's legendary hybrid reliability. These things practically run forever, and at this price, you're looking at one of the cleanest deals on the market right now.

text: Can you tell me about the car's maintenance history? Have there been any major services or repairs done?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question! This Prius has been meticulously maintained. The owner kept up with all the Toyota-recommended service intervals — oil changes, filter replacements, the works. No major repairs, which honestly isn't surprising given how bulletproof these hybrids are. The battery's in excellent condition, transmission is smooth as silk. I actually just had the brakes inspected last week and got a full detail done. You're looking at a car that's been treated right from day one.

args.message: I appreciate the offer, I really do. But $18,000 is a bit light given what we've got here. This car is priced fairly at $18,495 — actually, I just saw an identical 2018 Prius Two with slightly higher mileage go for $18,200 at auction last week. How about we meet in the middle at $18,350? That's a solid discount, and you're getting a vehicle that's been babied and will run for another 100,000 miles without a hiccup.
